zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理结构
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体维持震荡偏强格局，价格围绕71.2至72.1区间窄幅运行，短线多头略占优势但未形成有效突破。市场波动收敛，情绪偏中性略多，处于方向选择前的整理阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD维持0.93的正值动能，显示多头趋势尚未衰竭。价格稳站SMA20上方，均线支撑有效，但缺乏RSI数据辅助，整体动能表现为温和上行而非强趋势推动。

支撑位集中在71.2及71.0附近，对应近期低点与均线密集区域，防守较为关键。上方阻力位在72.1至72.3区间，若有效放量突破，有望进一步挑战73美元整数关口。

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，未突破前高不宜追涨，可在71.2附近分批低吸，控制风险为主。若放量突破72.3并站稳，可顺势参与短线多头延续行情。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana (SOL/USD) is currently consolidating just below short-term highs, with price action stabilizing around 71.98 after a modest 24-hour gain of 0.91%. The structure suggests a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias, as the market holds above the 20-day SMA at 71.05. This indicates buyers are defending recent gains while momentum pauses, forming a tight intraday range between 71.26 and 72.13, reflecting equilibrium between supply and demand in the near term.

Momentum indicators show early signs of strengthening despite incomplete readings, with MACD at 0.9347 suggesting positive momentum bias above the zero line. However, the absence of RSI and signal line data limits confirmation of overbought or divergence conditions. Price trading slightly above the 20-day SMA reinforces a short-term bullish tilt, though momentum remains fragile and dependent on breakout confirmation signals on lower timeframes.

Immediate support is located around the 71.00 psychological level, closely aligned with the 20-day SMA at 71.05, making this zone critical for maintaining bullish structure. Below this, 70.50 and 69.80 serve as secondary supports in case of breakdown. On the upside, resistance is seen at 72.13, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward 73.00 and 74.50. Levels remain technically significant short-term outlook.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range strategies while price remains between support at 71.00 and resistance at 72.13. Scalpers may look for mean-reversion entries near range extremes, while breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above resistance or below support. Risk management remains essential given low volatility and incomplete momentum confirmation conditions still favor consolidation bias environment for disciplined traders.
